name: Thought Bubble
scaffolding_intent: Displays a pixelated thought bubble above the character, scaffolding internal response, plan, and mental verbs

parameters.name: bubbleText
parameters.description: Text to display inside the thought bubble

parameters.name: scale
parameters.description: Size multiplier for the thought bubble

correction_intent: Child attributed the WRONG thought or feeling to a character (e.g. 'he thinks he is sad' when the scene shows the character is happy). Do NOT use D2 when the child described a thought/plan instead of an action — that is an action error, use A1 or A2 instead.
suggestion_intent: Child hasn't described what a character might be thinking
